headlines.headline: Betting tips, DFS picks for Saturday's four NBA playoff games
headlines.description: Jim McCormick breaks down Saturday's three NBA playoff games and offers his favorite bets and DFS plays.

headlines.headline: Quentin Richardson: LeBron showing that he's still one of the NBA's top talents
headlines.description: Quentin Richarson breaks down the message LeBron James is sending after his big performance for the Lakers in Game 3 vs. the Rockets.

headlines.headline: Ime Udoka calls out Rockets after Game 3 collapse
headlines.description: Ime Udoka speaks to reporters about what he saw in the Rockets' late collapse to the Lakers in their Game 3 loss.

headlines.headline: Harper scores 27 off bench, rallies Wemby-less Spurs in Game 3
headlines.description: Spurs rookie Dylan Harper had 27 points off the bench and teammate Stephon Castle had a game-high 33 to help the Spurs rally past the Blazers and take a 2-1 series lead.
